title: P2: Re-enable physicsTick entity observation hook
description:
## Problem
The `physicsTick` hook for `scanNearbyEntities` was commented out pending verification that chat works on both MC versions (1.16.5 and 1.21.x).

## Fix
Uncommented `bot.on('physicsTick', scanNearbyEntities)` in `MineflayerAdapter/index.js` line 391.
Updated comment block to reflect enabled state.

## Config
- `ENTITY_SCAN_RADIUS = 32` blocks
- `ENTITY_SCAN_COOLDOWN_MS = 3000` (scans every 3s)
- Detects 28 hostile mob types

## Validation
- `dotnet test` — 746/746 passed ✅
- Chat verified working on both 1.16.5 and 1.21.x in Sprint 55 Wave B ✅
